name: KrillApp.Project.Diagram
title: Diagram
description: Visualizes Krill nodes overlaid on an SVG background image. Load an SVG file (typically authored in Inkscape), detect anchor regions by scanning for elements whose id starts with k_, and bind those anchors to DataPoint nodes. In view mode, bound node icons update automatically by observing node state changes.
shortDescription: Visual SVG diagram with anchored nodes that update in real time based on node state.
llmPurpose: Displays an SVG diagram with anchor points bound to DataPoint nodes, updating icons in real time based on node state.
llmBehavior: detects anchor elements with k_* prefix in SVG
updates bound node icons in real time from state flows
llmOutputs: visual diagram with live node state indicators
llmTypicalUseCases: create a visual dashboard of sensor locations
overlay node status on a floor plan
visualize equipment layout with live data
llmPromptHints: show nodes on a floor plan
llmCreationHints: Create a Diagram when the user wants to visualize nodes on a custom SVG layout. Requires an SVG file with anchor elements (id starting with k_) and binding those anchors to DataPoint nodes.

llmConnectionHints.role: leaf display node that visualizes bound DataPoint states on an SVG background

llmExamples: Create a diagram showing sensor locations on my floor plan.
Overlay node status on this SVG layout.
Build a visual dashboard for my greenhouse sensors.
